rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §21.054, which governs educator continuing education requirements. The rule contains no provisions tied to homestead exemption values.
quote: Sec. 21.054. CONTINUING EDUCATION. (a) The board shall propose rules establishing a process for identifying continuing education courses and programs that fulfill educators' continuing education requirements
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §21.054 addresses educator continuing education and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
